message:
style(e2e,func,mvcc): minor idiom and formatting cleanups

- e2e/fsqlite_executor: use loop-as-expression to produce
  `has_where_separator` directly, eliminating the pre-declared mutable
  binding.
- func/builtins: remove redundant `&*` deref in `Arc::from()` calls in
  substr test helpers — `Arc::from(s)` already accepts `&str`.
- mvcc/lifecycle: apply rustfmt line-break corrections for long match
  arm patterns (IntentReplay | StructuredPatch | RawXorLab) and a
  trailing `else if` condition.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
